subtitle_main: A clear view of your learning momentum, completed sessions, feedback, and next best step.
subtitle_not_logged_in: You need to be logged in to view this page.

course_active_meta: {remaining} sessions remaining in this learning path.
course_empty_meta: Choose a package to activate course progress.
path_subtitle: Completed sessions become checkpoints with feedback, materials, and practice time.
path_empty_text: Once your first course session is completed, this area becomes a journey timeline.
mission_subtitle: Your next best action will appear here.
skills_subtitle: These scores use real activity now; coach skill scoring can make them more precise later.

timeline_empty: Your monthly activity will appear here.
source_consistency: Based on attendance and completed sessions
source_feedback_loop: Based on sessions with coach feedback
